evals.prompt: Create a new Expo React Native app called FieldNotes using the latest stable Expo SDK. Set up NativeWind, gluestack-ui v3 with basic components, a placeholder screen, EAS Build, and EAS Update.
evals.expected_output: A scaffolded Expo app using a stable SDK, stable compatible NativeWind, gluestack-ui v3 provider/components, a starter screen, EAS build profiles, EAS update channels, and verification notes.

evals.prompt: Scaffold an Expo Router app named DispatchDesk using Bun. Make it iOS and Android, add gluestack-ui v3, NativeWind, preview and production EAS updates, and scripts for development, preview, and production builds.
evals.expected_output: A Bun-friendly Expo Router project with NativeWind and gluestack configured, gluestack starter components, EAS profiles/channels, package scripts, and no invented credentials or app store IDs.

evals.prompt: Create a production-oriented Expo starter with gluestack. If the latest NativeWind version is not clearly stable for the latest Expo SDK, ask me before choosing it.
evals.expected_output: The agent verifies NativeWind stability and asks before using a preview/pre-release line instead of silently installing it.

evals.prompt: Create an Expo app starter that may later use Expo API routes and a landing website. Ask me what structure I want before scaffolding, then choose a clean monorepo if I request backend or landing support.
evals.expected_output: The agent asks about mobile-only, backend/API support, and landing-site support, then scaffolds or proposes an apps/mobile, optional apps/landing, and packages/api/shared workspace structure.
